title: Xtra Rich Turkish Lamb Stew
description: A rich and juicy Turkish stew featuring lamb, semi-skimmed milk, and a blend of spices, perfect for a hangover cure. This macrobiotic-friendly dish is made with brine-dry ingredients for added flavor.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it is softened and translucent.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the lamb cubes and cook until they are browned on all sides.
Add the paprika, salt, black pepper, and dried thyme, and stir to combine.
Pour in the semi-skimmed milk and bring the mixture to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and let the stew cook, covered, for 1 1/2 hours.
Serve the stew hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
